cases.title: Register with available seat assigns Registered per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Event is RegistrationOpen with configured capacity greater than current Registered count
Registration window is active (current time between registrationOpenAt and registrationCloseAt)
Authenticated participant has no active registration for the event
steps: Invoke registrationService.register(eventId, participantId, actorContext) for a participant with no prior registration
Read the returned registration entity and query Registered seat-holder count for the event
cases.expected: Registration is created with state Registered, waitlistPosition is null, Registered count increments by one, and total Registered never exceeds EventCapacity (testing-plan §3: Register with available seat → Registered)

cases.title: POST registrations returns HTTP 200 with Registered envelope
preconditions: Published event with registration opened, capacity 5, zero existing Registered participants
Valid participant JWT
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations with Authorization bearer token and Idempotency-Key header
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registration-status for the same participant
GET /api/v1/me/registrations for the same participant
cases.expected: POST returns HTTP 200 with body containing registrationId, eventId, participantId, state Registered, waitlistPosition null, reasonCode null, and updatedAt; GET registration-status and GET /me/registrations both reflect the same Registered assignment per FR-10 near real-time tracking

cases.title: Participant registers via UI and sees Registered status
preconditions: Event visible on participant discovery list with registration open and available seats
Participant logged in with no existing registration for the event
steps: Navigate to event detail page for an open event with available capacity
Click register (or equivalent primary registration action)
Observe registration status on event detail, participant discovery card overlay (FR-28), and/or my registrations list (FR-29)
cases.expected: UI shows registration succeeded with Registered status (badge, label, or status text) on event detail and my registrations without requiring manual page reload beyond normal client refresh; discovery card overlay reflects active Registered registration when applicable

cases.title: Successful registration persists atomically within capacity guard transaction
preconditions: Event with capacity 5 and zero Registered participants in RegistrationOpen state
Active registration window
Database transaction boundaries enabled for registration module
steps: Complete registrationService.register assigning Registered state
Query registration row and Registered seat-holder count in the same database session after commit
cases.expected: Registration row exists with state Registered, Registered count equals 1, BR-03 invariant holds (Registered count never exceeds EventCapacity) immediately after commit, and Workflow B records the state transition

cases.title: Flow A lifecycle register step yields Registered at start of participant journey
preconditions: E2E fixture: draft event created with capacity 5
Organizer transitions event through publish and open-registration
Fresh participant token and Idempotency-Key
steps: Execute Flow A step: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations after open-registration
Verify registration state before proceeding to check-in, feedback, and eligibility steps
cases.expected: Registration response state is Registered, enabling subsequent check-in, feedback, and eligibility steps in the lifecycle flow

cases.title: Registration rejected when outside registration window despite available seats
preconditions: Event has available seats (Registered count below capacity)
Current time is before registrationOpenAt or after registrationCloseAt (fixed clock)
Participant has no active registration
steps: Attempt registrationService.register for the participant
Observe error response and absence of new registration row
cases.expected: Registration does not succeed; API returns HTTP 422 with error code REGISTRATION_WINDOW_CLOSED per validation catalog; no new Registered record is created

cases.title: Registration rejected when event is not RegistrationOpen
preconditions: Event is Published but registration not yet opened, or registration is closed/paused
Seats are available by capacity count
Authenticated participant with no active registration
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations while event state disallows registration intake
cases.expected: HTTP 409 or 422 with typed error envelope; response body state is not Registered; no seat consumed

cases.title: Last available seat assigns Registered without exceeding capacity
preconditions: Event capacity is N with exactly N-1 participants already in Registered state
Event is RegistrationOpen with active registration window
New participant has no active registration
steps: Register one additional participant via registrationService.register
Query count of Registered participants for the event
cases.expected: New registration has state Registered; total Registered count equals EventCapacity exactly (N); no overflow beyond capacity

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin and OrganizerStaff denied POST registrations
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen with available seats
Valid JWT for OrganizerAdmin (or OrganizerStaff scoped to the event)
Actor has no participant registration for the event
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations with OrganizerAdmin bearer token and Idempotency-Key
Repeat POST with OrganizerStaff bearer token for the same event
cases.expected: Both requests return HTTP 403 unauthorized; no registration row is created; Register for event capability is Participant-only per roles-permissions matrix

cases.title: Unauthenticated POST registrations returns HTTP 401
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen with available seats
No Authorization header on the request
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations without Authorization header
cases.expected: HTTP 401 with standard error envelope; no registration created; participant authentication required before registration can succeed

cases.title: Available seats with waitlist enabled still assign Registered not Waitlisted
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen with capacity 10 and 3 Registered participants
waitlistEnabled true on EventRuleConfig
Active registration window
New participant with no active registration
steps: Register participant via registrationService.register
Inspect returned state and waitlistPosition
cases.expected: Registration succeeds with state Registered and waitlistPosition null because seats remain available; BR-04 waitlist path applies only when event is full, not when seats are available
